content.en:
"Xiao Yue, since you don't admit defeat, let you see my true strength! The Ancestral Tablet Divine General List is nothing at all, what it shows is not my real strength!"

The killing spirit roared wildly, and the momentum of a nine-star peak god general burst out, and it was not an ordinary nine-star peak god general, but a nine-star peak god general who was very close to a ten-star god general.

This nine-star peak god general even has a chance to step into the ten-star god general, but this step is not so easy to cross, even if countless treasures of the battlefield relics are born by chance, but the killing spirit is only a god general, and he is not qualified to participate in the opportunity competition for the battlefield relics.

Of course, as a true top genius of the Chaos Life Alliance, and a descendant of Dao Ancestor, he naturally received the greatest cultivation from the Chaos Life Alliance, but the time was limited, so he could not step into the ranks of the Ten Star God Generals in a short period of time.

But Killing Spirit was very confident in his own strength, and even if he encountered other nine-star peak generals, he was fully sure that he would win the battle.

After the Killing Spirit broke out with the strength of the Nine-Star Peak Divine General, he immediately used another Chaos Strange Thing, and his strength skyrocketed again.

Then, a supreme Chaos Arcana that increased its strength levitated above the head of the Killing Spirit, causing its aura to increase by a small amount again.

It will be very difficult for the Nine-Star Peak God to use the Half Dao Weapon and the Dao Weapon, otherwise it will be very easy for the Killing Spirit to get a Dao Weapon.

One by one, the best Chaos Treasures were urged by the Killing Spirit, and the Killing Spirit exerted the Tianlin Divine Body that belonged to the Tianlin Beast clan, and the momentum of the whole person suppressed everything like an endless sea.

In this state, the Killing Spirit is simply extremely strong.

The True Monarchs and even Dao Ancestor incarnations who were following this battle showed a little surprise, obviously surprised by the strength of the Soul Slayer.

Looking at the nine-star peak god generals in the history of chaos, the killing spirit is definitely enough to be ranked.

"The killing spirit is so powerful, Xiao Yue has little chance of winning!"

Some True Monarchs muttered.

Obviously, they are not optimistic about Xiao Yue.

"Die!"

Holding a god-killing spear, the Killing Spirit killed Xiao Yue with one blow.

"The Great Killing Divine Technique!"

This is a powerful Chaos Divine Power that ranked tenth on the Chaos Divine Power List before, and there are almost no such Chaos Divine Powers in the top major forces, and only the transcendent forces have such Chaotic Divine Power inheritance.

The extremely terrifying spear seems to be able to kill everything, even if it is other nine-star peak generals, if they don't have enough demonic means, they can't stop this move at all.

After all, with so many amplifications, this blow was even more terrifying than the full force of some ten-star god generals.

Opposite side.

Xiao Yue was not in a hurry, and also urged one strange thing after another to increase her own strength.

As Ye Tian's wife, she naturally has no shortage of these strange things, so in terms of treasures, she will definitely not be weaker than the Soul Killer.

"Do you want to expose all your strength?"

Xiao Yue had presented this idea before, but in the face of the killing spirit of a mere nine-star peak god general, she felt that she didn't need to expose her full strength, otherwise once her strength was known by the enemy, it would be easy to be targeted.

No one knows how many hole cards those gods will have, and if the Dao Ancestor incarnations do whatever it takes, no matter how strong she is, she may be severely injured or even defeated.

Therefore, she must hide her strength and not let others see her full strength, at least not at the moment.

"Then use that supernatural power!"

Xiao Yue thought in her heart.

Airplanes!

An ancient stone gate appeared in front of Xiao Yue, protecting her and blocking the Great Killing Divine Technique of Killing Spirits.

Boom!

The stone gate stood still, but the blow of the Great Killing Divine Technique collapsed.

"How is that possible?"

Many True Monarchs were dumbfounded.

That's the Great Killing Divine Technique, even more powerful and terrifying than the Great Destruction Technique, and the strength of the Killing Soul has increased to such an unimaginable level, the power of this blow is simply terrifying!

But unexpectedly, a small stone gate blocked the Great Killing Divine Technique.

The true monarchs' eyesight is not bad, and they can naturally see that the stone gate is not a treasure, but a magical power.

But they had never seen this Chaos Divine Power, but they knew very well that this Chaos Divine Power was definitely not the top of the Chaos Divine Power list, at least it was not a known powerful Chaos Divine Power.

Soon, someone guessed the origin of this chaotic supernatural power.

"It should be the Chaos Divine Power of the Domain Realm!"

There is a real monarch who guessed.

The domain realm is very strong, although it is only a world, it is a world above the Dao realm, even stronger than their own realm.

There are many chaotic supernatural powers unearthed on the battlefield ruins, many of which are more powerful than the Great Killing Divine Technique, but those chaotic supernatural powers are difficult to cultivate.

On top of that, they lacked the fusion talent needed to develop such terrifying Chaos Divine Powers.

That's when it happened.

A voice came from the void, and it was the voice of a Dao Ancestor incarnation.

"That should be the Gate of Eternity, a chaotic supernatural ability that can be called among the top 100 in the Divine Heaven Realm, this chaotic supernatural ability requires a fusion talent of super-god-level life talent, super-god-level space talent, and super-god-level defense talent-Eternal talent!"

As soon as these words came out, the audience was shocked.

Eternal Talent!

This is a fusion of three super god-level talents, three super god-level talents, not two super god-level talents.

"Impossible, there is no treasure in our realm that can fuse three talents into one, how could Xiao Yue have such a fusion talent?

"That's right, our transcendent forces haven't gotten this kind of treasure in the battlefield ruins, why should she?"

"It should be the treasure obtained by Wanfa Daozi, the three talents are fused with things, which are extremely rare in the domain realm, but it does not mean that they do not exist, the four transcendent forces entered the field a little late, and the benefits obtained by Wanfa Daozi in the battlefield ruins are beyond the imagination of ordinary people, and it is not impossible to have such treasures. It's just that he never expected that he would be willing to give such a treasure to his wife!"

......

The discussion of the Dao Ancestors and the True Monarchs did not shy away from Ye Tian at all, and although Ye Tian heard it, he didn't say anything.

And in the ring, the competition continues.

But this time, it was Xiao Yue who took the initiative to attack the Killing Spirit, and the Killing Spirit became the defending side.
